context: Tests whether the agent implements FIFO and weighted average COGS assignment following the required patterns: transactional FIFO with correct layer ordering, explicit error on insufficient stock, dynamically computed weighted average using SQL aggregation, and null cost_layer_id for weighted average entries.

checklist.name: FIFO uses transaction
checklist.description: The FIFO cost assignment function wraps all database operations (layer updates and COGS entry creation) inside a single database transaction

checklist.name: FIFO layer ordering
checklist.description: The FIFO function orders cost layers by receipt_date ASC (oldest first), with a secondary sort on created_at ASC or equivalent tiebreaker

checklist.name: FIFO filters remaining quantity
checklist.description: The FIFO function filters cost layers to only those with quantity_remaining > 0

checklist.name: FIFO explicit error on stockout
checklist.description: The FIFO function throws or returns an error (does NOT silently skip or return 0) when there are insufficient cost layers to cover the requested quantity

checklist.name: Weighted avg uses SQL aggregation
checklist.description: The weighted average function computes the average cost by querying the database (SUM of quantity_remaining * unit_cost / SUM of quantity_remaining), NOT by reading a pre-stored cached average field

checklist.name: Weighted avg division safety
checklist.description: The weighted average SQL uses NULLIF or equivalent guard on the denominator to avoid division-by-zero, and COALESCE or equivalent to return 0 when there is no inventory

checklist.name: Weighted avg cost_layer_id is null
checklist.description: The COGS entry created by the weighted average function sets cost_layer_id to null (since no single layer is being consumed)

checklist.name: COGS at line level
checklist.description: Both functions accept and record an order_line_id (not just an order_id) on the COGS entry, enabling per-line margin analysis

checklist.name: FIFO sets costing_method field
checklist.description: COGS entries created by the FIFO function set costing_method to 'fifo'

checklist.name: Weighted avg sets costing_method field
checklist.description: COGS entries created by the weighted average function set costing_method to 'weighted_avg' (or 'weighted_average')

checklist.name: FIFO consumes layers iteratively
checklist.description: The FIFO function iterates through multiple layers when a single layer does not have enough units, consuming from each layer in order until the full quantity is assigned
